result.name: Protection amulet
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Stylized amulet worn on a chain Effect:The amulet reduces one type of damage by an amount equal to the artifact level. Roll a [[/r d20]] to determine the kind of damage the amulet protects against. 1–4 Acid 5–8 Cold 9–12 Electricity 13–16 Fire 17–20 Poison Depletion: 1 in 1d6 (check each time the amulet reduces damage)

sections.name: Protection amulet
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6

Form: Stylized amulet worn on a chain

Effect:The amulet reduces one type of damage by an amount equal to the artifact level. Roll a [[/r d20]] to determine the kind of damage the amulet protects against.

1–4
Acid

5–8
Cold

9–12
Electricity

13–16
Fire

17–20
Poison

Depletion: 1 in 1d6 (check each time the amulet reduces damage)
